_comment: Written by scripts/regen-src-golden.mjs (#91). `sha256` must match tests/fixtures/src-bundle.golden.js — tests/src-bundle-parity.test.ts enforces it, so a hand-edited golden, or one regenerated by any means that skips the reason prompt, fails the gate.
reason: #107 review fix: split SCI_TIP — U2's RbuyJobs DOES fire Scientists (jobs.ts:615,774), so the shared 'never removes them' claim was false for RScientistPercent
